hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.subtitle: Building modern web experiences with passion and precision
hero.label: Session

about.title: About Me
about.label: Profile
about.p1: Full Stack Web Developer with over 5 years of experience in website and web application development. Currently working at Dígitro Tecnologia, joining the Front-end team of NeoInteract, a Contact Center solution for small and medium businesses, using modern technologies such as Node.js, TypeScript, React, Redux, Socket.IO, automated testing, and containerization.
about.p2: I have knowledge in Full Stack development, working with languages like JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, PHP, and frameworks such as Node.js, Express, and React. Proficient in relational (MySQL) and non-relational (MongoDB) databases, as well as experience in configuring and managing web environments with tools like Git, SSH, CPanel, Plesk, and cloud services like AWS and DigitalOcean.
about.p3: Throughout my career, I have worked as a freelance professional developing websites in WordPress, managing hosting services, and performing network and server maintenance. I also have experience in complementary areas such as IT, administration, law, and public procurement, which gives me a broad and strategic view of projects. Constantly evolving, I seek to contribute with innovative and efficient solutions, combining my technical experience with the ability to work in teams and solve problems creatively.

digitro.description: Front-end development of NeoInteract, a Contact Center solution aimed at small and medium businesses, part of the Nexus Suite, Dígitro's corporate communication ecosystem. Technologies: JavaScript, Node.js, TypeScript, Socket.IO, React, Redux, Automated Testing with Jest, Material UI, CSS, Docker, and more, in a multitenant architecture hosted in the cloud.

bullets: Website development on the WordPress platform
Web hosting management with CPanel and Plesk software
Creation, adaptation, and customization of websites using PHP, HTML, CSS
Support and installation of operating systems and software — Linux, Windows, and macOS
Assembly, maintenance, and configuration of networks and servers

neointeract.description: Contact Center solution for small and medium businesses, part of the Nexus Suite corporate communication ecosystem. Developed the front-end with React, TypeScript, Redux, and Socket.IO in a multi-tenant cloud architecture.

persona-nocode.description: No-code visual editor for building IVR flows and chatbots on the Persona platform. Spearheaded an AI-driven front-end refactoring focused on reducing maintenance costs through architectural modernization — TypeScript adoption, Zustand state management, Material UI migration, feature-based architecture, and Atomic Design — delivering a more maintainable and cohesive ecosystem.

catalogo-movingsale.description: Minimalist landing page for a residential furniture moving sale, built with React, TypeScript, and Vite. Features product catalog with images and contact integration.

dt-frontend-digitro.description: Technical challenge for Dígitro's hiring process — a React application for managing chat service calls with real-time status tracking, filtering, and a responsive dashboard interface.

trybe-recipes-app.description: Collaborative web application for browsing food and drink recipes using external APIs. Developed as a group project following Scrum methodology with React, Redux, and agile practices.
